title: Lysiella oligantha
taxonomy: Lysiella oligantha is a species of freshwater snail, belonging to the family Psammobiotidae. It is a type of aquatic gastropod mollusk, specifically classified as a genus within the superfamily Cerithioidea. The classification of Lysiella oligantha can be broken down into several taxonomic ranks, including family, genus, species, phylum, and kingdom. The phylum to which Lysiella oligantha belongs is Mollusca, and the kingdom is Animalia. At the species level, Lysiella oligantha is a monotypic genus, meaning it is the only species within its genus.
